---
title: "Matching TRG"
subtitle: "Main Article, Dataset Expansion Labs, and Slides"
---

## Main Article

The primary article for this site is:

- [Matching Methods Report](matching_methods_report.qmd)

Supporting pages for implementation and audit:

- [Full Code Companion](matching_methods_report_full_code.qmd)
- [QA Log](matching_methods_report_qa_log.qmd)

## Dataset Expansion Labs

The dataset expansion workstream is scaffolded as additional labs:

- [Dataset Expansion Lab Hub](labs/index.qmd)
- [Black Politicians Lab](labs/black_politicians_lab.qmd)
- [NSW + CPS Benchmark Lab](labs/nsw_cps_benchmark_lab.qmd)
- [Titanic Teaching Lab](labs/titanic_teaching_lab.qmd)
- [Data Acquisition Lab](labs/data_acquisition_lab.qmd)

## Slides Space

A dedicated slides section is included for training delivery:

- [Slides Hub](slides/index.qmd)
- [Starter Slide Deck](slides/matching_methods_slides.qmd)
